subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest towards God! Persian, Arabic and Turkish are all tongues of the lovers of the Beauty of the Best-Beloved. Love itself [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر الی الله فارسی و عربی و ترکی همه لسان عاشقان جمال جانانست عشق را خود
subcodes.subjects: @language and the structure of reality, @outward and inward meanings
